page_content:
Formerly: UNIV348P.

HNUH338T Homeland and National Security Policy (3 Credits)

An examination of the concept of U.S. homeland and national security, threats, and major vulnerabilities in the context of recent history. Cross-listed with: FGSM330.

Restriction: Must be in the Federal Fellows Program; and permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. UNIV348T, HNUH338T or FGSM330.
